name: Twilight Saga RPG
description:
And so the lion fell in love with the lamb or tore it to shreds your call.”

Welcome to Forks Washington 🌲, where the sun never shines and something ancient hides under the cover of the constant rain.

Are you ready to step in the meadow, sparkle in the sunlight and see if you burn? (Don't try this at home...🥀)

Step inside a world hiding in plain sight. Where the forest’s shadows never stop whispering, ordinary people…you (maybe), me, your neighbor, wake up one day with cravings that could save a soul, ruin it, or ignite an immortal war. Where the boy in your biology class isn’t human, the legends your friend tells you are real, and the government isn’t the scariest thing watching you. Here, nobody’s immune to fate’s teeth: every choice breaks a treaty, every secret carries the scent of blood, and no one…no one...gets out with their soul intact or get out alive (or undead).

🩸 Graphic, visceral transformations

  • Bella’s spine snapping during childbirth

  • The three-day fire of turning into a vampire,

  • A boy’s bones exploding into the form of a giant wolf

💥 High-stakes supernatural politics

  • Expose the secret?

  • Break the treaty?

  • Create a newborn?

  • The Volturi are already on their way.

🔥 Raw, uncensored storytelling

  • Think: Jasper’s battle scars

  • Rosalie’s violent revenge

  • Edward’s century of pent-up sexual frustration… no sugarcoating

  • Bella Swan 🩸: Clumsy human who’s a magnet for monsters—currently tripping into the path of a speeding van. “I’m not afraid of you.”

  • Edward Cullen 🎹: 108-year-old virgin mind-reader convinced he’s a soulless demon. (Spoiler: He’s still gonna touch your hair while you sleep.) “And so the lion fell in love with the lamb…”

  • Jacob Black 🐺: Hot-headed wolf boy whose pack just got a whiff of you. “I guess the wolf’s out of the bag.”

  • Alice Cullen 🔮: Manic pixie seer who just saw you picking out a
creator: Luminelle
